command.spec-data.showPreview.title: Open Preview
command.spec-data.showLockedPreviewToSid: Open Locked Preview to the Side
command.spec-data.preview.refresh.title: Refresh Preview
configuration.spec-data.preview.scrollEd: Synchronizes page scroll of a editor with that of the corresoinding preview.
configuration.spec-data.preview.scrollPr: Synchronizes page scroll of a preview with that of the corresoinding editor.
configuration.spec-data.preview.smoothSc: Controls whether the preview will scroll using an animation. Use `#editor.smoothScrolling#` to control the scroll behavior of the editor.
configuration.spec-data.preview.retainCo: Controls whether to retain contents of a hidden preview tab in memory. Enabling this option potentially requires high memory overhead. A change in this option does not affect previews already open.
configuration.spec-data.preview.applyCon: Applies a content security policy (CSP) to a preview, which enhances security against cross site scripting and data injection attacks caused by malicious source files. One may be able to avoid several Plotly.js errors when the option is disabled.
configuration.spec-data.preview.autoLock: Locks the editor group when a preview is created in a new editor group. See `#workbench.editor.autoLockGroups#` about how locking works.
configuration.spec-data.preview.plot.max: Maximum number of graphs to be drawn when a preview is created. Drawing a large number of plots requires both long time and vast memory footprint.
configuration.spec-data.preview.plot.col: Color scale for heatmaps and contour plots.
configuration.spec-data.preview.plot.tem: Customizes data-related appearances such as a line color. For details, see the _Extension Settings_ section in README.md and Plotly.js's [Figure Reference](https://plotly.com/javascript/reference/index).

Customizes layout-related appearances such as a background color. For details, see the _Extension Settings_ section in README.md and Plotly.js's [Figure Reference: layout](https://plotly.com/javascript/reference/layout).
configuration.spec-data.preview.plot.tra: Customizes trace appearances such as a trace color. The key shall be either `"light"`, `"dark"`, `"highContrast"`, or `"highContrastLight"` and the value shall be an array of Plotly.js scatter templates. See the _Extension Settings_ section in README.md. One can find the complete list of the template attributes in [Plotly.js Reference](https://plotly.com/javascript/reference/index/).
configuration.spec-data.preview.plot.lay: Customizes layout appearances such as a background color. The key shall be either `"light"`, `"dark"`, `"highContrast"`, or `"highContrastLight"` and the value shall be a Plotly.js layout template. See the _Extension Settings_ section in README.md. One can find the complete list of the template attributes in [Plotly.js Reference](https://plotly.com/javascript/reference/index/).
configuration.spec-data.preview.plot.ena: Makes multiple data arrays selectable for plotting a graph when a preview is created.
Makes the right axis available for plotting a graph when a preview is created.
configuration.spec-data.preview.table.hi: Hides motor-position tables when a preview is created.
configuration.spec-data.preview.table.co: Maximum column number of motor-position tables. Overflowed columns are folded in the next row.
Maximum column number of motor-position tables. Overflowed columns are folded in the next row.
configuration.spec-data.preview.table.he: Header type of data cells in motor-position tables.
capabilities.untrustedWorkspaces.descrip: In untrusted workspaces, the content security policy is forcibly applied to the preview and Plotly.js templates in workspace settings are ignored.
